label: AIPO AI Governance Lifecycle
description: 8-phase AI governance document lifecycle (P0–P7) covering strategic initiation through controlled closure, with 39 structured governance document templates and risk-frequency color coding.

phases.name: Strategic Initiation
phases.description: Initiative chartering, governance model declaration, and preliminary risk posture.

phases.name: Problem Definition
phases.description: Problem scoping, stakeholder ownership, and use-case impact assessment.

phases.name: Data Understanding
phases.description: Data inventory, classification, lineage, and quality/sensitivity assessment.

phases.name: Data Preparation
phases.description: Data preparation summary, bias assessment, and minimization/retention justification.

phases.name: Modeling
phases.description: Model architecture, training configuration, threat modeling, and explainability.

phases.name: Evaluation
phases.description: Performance validation, bias/fairness assessment, residual risk, and security verification.

phases.name: Deployment & Monitoring
phases.description: Deployment planning, operational RACI, drift monitoring, logging, and incident response.

phases.name: Controlled Closure & Stewardship
phases.description: Operational validation, decommission planning, governance transition, lessons learned, and archival.
